raw_entries.text: Match ends, Norway 1, France 4.
Second Half ends, Norway 1, France 4.
Thelo Aasgaard (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Rayan Cherki (France).
Goal! Norway 1, France 4. Désiré Doué (France) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bradley Barcola with a cross.
Attempt missed. Théo Hernández (France) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Bradley Barcola.
Handball by Fredrik Aursnes (Norway).
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.
Offside, Norway. Jørgen Strand Larsen is caught offside.
Substitution, France. Malo Gusto replaces Jules Koundé.
Substitution, France. Jean-Philippe Mateta replaces Kylian Mbappé.
Attempt missed. Fredrik Aursnes (Norway) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Jules Koundé.
Substitution, Norway. Antonio Nusa replaces Oscar Bobb.
Substitution, Norway. Jens Petter Hauge replaces Andreas Schjelderup.
Oscar Bobb (Norway) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Bradley Barcola (France).
Corner, France. Conceded by Egil Selvik.

Substitution, France. Ibrahima Konaté replaces Dayot Upamecano.
Foul by Aurélien Tchouaméni (France).
Aurélien Tchouaméni (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt saved. Oscar Bobb (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Mike Maignan (France). Assisted by Thelo Aasgaard.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Foul by Morten Thorsby (Norway).
Manu Koné (France) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Norway. Sondre Langås replaces Henrik Falchener.
Corner, France. Conceded by Thelo Aasgaard.
Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.
Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Ousmane Dembélé.
Attempt blocked. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Jørgen Strand Larsen (Norway) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Maxence Lacroix (France).

Foul by Leo Østigård (Norway).
Désiré Doué (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Attempt missed. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Désiré Doué.
Delay in match because of an injury Egil Selvik (Norway).
Attempt missed. Leo Østigård (Norway) header from the left side of the six yard box misses to the right. Assisted by Patrick Berg with a cross following a corner.
Corner, Norway. Conceded by Dayot Upamecano.
Penalty saved. Jørgen Strand Larsen (Norway) right footed shot saved in the bottom right corner by Mike Maignan (France).
Penalty Norway. Oscar Bobb draws a foul in the penalty area.
Penalty conceded by Théo Hernández (France) after a foul in the penalty area.
Substitution, Norway. Morten Thorsby replaces Kristian Thorstvedt.
Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces Fredrik Bjørkan.
Second Half begins Norway 1, France 3.
First Half ends, Norway 1, France 3.
Foul by Andreas Schjelderup (Norway).
Michael Olise (France) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Goal! Norway 0, France 2. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé following a fast break.
Attempt blocked. Thelo Aasgaard (Norway) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Fredrik Bjørkan.
